zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Clinton 3rd Lord Clinton於1328年4月13日之前出生在英國英格蘭時，他的父親John de Clinton, 2nd Lord Clinton29歲，母親Margery Corbet24歲。他於1350年與Idonea de Saye在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾馬可斯托可結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1398年9月6日在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾馬可斯托可 卡素，埋葬在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾米爾頓 凱恩斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Clinton 3rd Lord Clinton于1328年4月13日之前出生在英国英格兰时，他的父亲John de Clinton, 2nd Lord Clinton29岁，母亲Margery Corbet24岁。他于1350年与Idonea de Saye在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾馬可斯托可结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1398年9月6日在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾馬可斯托可 卡素，埋葬在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾米爾頓 凱恩斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Clinton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish (Louth, Westmeath) and Scottish: shortened form of   McClinton  .

English: habitational name, either from Glympton in Oxfordshire, named as ‘settlement (Old English tūn) on the Glym river’, a Celtic river name meaning ‘bright stream’, or from Glinton in Northamptonshire, early recorded as Clinton (named with an unrecorded Old English element akin to Middle Low German glinde ‘enclosure, fence’ + Old English tūn). The surname was taken to Ireland in or before the 16th century.

History: Charles Clinton (born 1690 in Longford, Ireland) organized a group of colonists and founded the settlement of Little Britain, Ulster County, NY, in 1731. His son George Clinton (1739–1812) was governor of NY (1777–95), and they had many prominent descendants. — An English aristocratic family called Clinton was founded by Geoffrey de Clinton (flourished 1130), who held lands at Glympton, Oxfordshire. He was chamberlain and treasurer to Henry I (1100–35).

variants.name: McClinton
meanings: Irish (northern) and Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Gille Fhionntain (Scottish), Mac Giolla Fhionntáin (Irish) ‘son of the servant (i.e. devotee) of (Saint) Fionntan’, whose name has been explained as ‘the white ancient’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John de Clinton 3rd Lord Clinton was born before 13 April 1328, in England, United Kingdom, his father, John de Clinton, 2nd Lord Clinton, was 29 and his mother, Margery Corbet, was 24. He married Idonea de Saye in 1350, in Maxstoke, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 6 September 1398, in Maxstoke Castle, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Clinton 3rd Lord Clinton est né avant 13 avril 1328, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Clinton, 2nd Lord Clinton, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Margery Corbet, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Idonea de Saye en 1350, à Maxstoke, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 6 septembre 1398, à Maxstoke Castle, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterré à Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Clinton 3rd Lord Clinton vor 13. April 1328 in England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Clinton, 2nd Lord Clinton 29 und seine Mutter Margery Corbet 24. Er hat 1350 in Maxstoke, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom Idonea de Saye geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 6. September 1398 in Maxstoke Castle, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Clinton 3rd Lord Clinton è nato il prima del 13 aprile 1328 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John de Clinton, 2nd Lord Clinton, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Margery Corbet, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Idonea de Saye nel 1350, nel Maxstoke, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 6 settembre 1398, nel Maxstoke Castle, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolto a Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Clinton 3rd Lord Clintonが1328年4月13日以前にイギリスイギリスで生まれた時，父John de Clinton, 2nd Lord Clintonは29歳，母Margery Corbetは24歳であった。1350年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアマクスストクでIdonea de Sayeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1398年9月6日にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアマクスストク カストルで死去し，イギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアミルトン ケインスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Clinton 3rd Lord Clinton(이)가 1328년 4월 13일 이전 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Clinton, 2nd Lord Clinton(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery Corbet(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1350년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 맥스스토크에서 Idonea de Saye(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1398년 9월 6일 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 맥스스토크 카스틀에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 미턴 케인스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Clinton 3rd Lord Clinton nasceu antes 13 de abril de 1328, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John de Clinton, 2nd Lord Clinton, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Margery Corbet, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Idonea de Saye em 1350, em Maxstoke, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 6 de setembro de 1398, em Maxstoke Castle, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultado em Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Clinton 3rd Lord Clinton родился перед 13 апрель 1328 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John de Clinton, 2nd Lord Clinton было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery Corbet, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Idonea de Saye в 1350 г. в местности макссток, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 6 сентября 1398 г. в местности макссток кастл, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности милтон кинесь, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Clinton 3rd Lord Clinton nació antes de 13 de abril de 1328, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John de Clinton, 2nd Lord Clinton, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Margery Corbet, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Idonea de Saye en 1350, en Maxstoke, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 6 de septiembre de 1398, en Maxstoke Castle, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultado en Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
